title: Redistribute Characters to Make All Strings Equal
titleCn: 重新分配字符使所有字符串都相等

testcases.input: words = ["abc","aabc","bc"] Output: true Explanation: Move the first 'a' in words[1] to the front of words[2], to make words[1] = "abc" and words[2] = "abc". All the strings are now equal to "abc", so return true.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: Move the first 'a' in words[1] to the front of words[2], to make words[1] = "abc" and words[2] = "abc". All the strings are now equal to "abc", so return true.

testcases.input: words = ["ab","a"] Output: false Explanation: It is impossible to make all the strings equal using the operation.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is impossible to make all the strings equal using the operation.
